title: merrittia benguetensis
intro: Merrittia benguetensis is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the Philippines. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Merrittia benguetensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in skin care due to its antiseptic properties. Merrittia benguetensis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Filipino medicine to promote overall well-being.
